title: lichen_l2.c:1691 reinit_after_abort lacks atomic for link_ctx_initialized
description: Contract violation: lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort() - Does not clear or check link_ctx_initialized atomic. If called from deinit(), the caller (lora_l2.c) calls lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort() but lichen_l2.c's link_ctx_initialized is not touched. deinit() at lora_l2.c:958-960 conditionally calls this, but if link_ctx_initialized is still set after abort, subsequent enable() might skip re-init. WHY: Inconsistent state between modules. HOW to fix: Either have reinit_after_abort also clear link_ctx_initialized, or document that caller must handle this (deinit doesn't reach lichen_l2's internals).
close_reason: Cleared link_ctx_initialized during lichen_l2_reinit_after_abort() abort recovery and verified lichen_l2.c object compile
